meaning: it does not necessarily mean that
quizQuestion:
全然見込みがないわけ{___}が、あまり期待はしない方がいいでしょう
(it does not mean that there is no hope, but you'd better not expect too much)
pedagogicalNote: わけ = meaning/reason/circumstances (logical conclusion); わけではない = doesn't necessarily mean; の(nominalizer) = turns verb phrase into noun; のだ = explanation/reason; か(embedded) = the question of whether

quizQuestion:
中野先生はたいてい研究室にいらっしゃるのに、今日{___}いらしゃらなかった。
(Professor Nakano is usually in his office, but today, of all days, he wasn't there.)
pedagogicalNote: に限って = of all people/things (ironic limit); ~放題 = as much as one likes/unlimited; 挙げ句 = in the end after all that (negative outcome after prolonged effort)
